c83944022214813549ce4e96dcacb2","dweb:/ipfs/QmcaBrtt6PToKdDTzfuRytMfhoz5fsa1BzdxqYBdyoPff7"]}},"version":1}

approve(address,uint256).details: Sets `account` as the approved account to manage token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist. - The caller must be the owner of the token,   or an approved operator for the token owner. Emits an {Approval} event.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens owned by `owner`. Requirements: - `owner` must not be the zero address.

ciphertextLength().details: C = ceil(N/3)*3 + 1; Poseidon encrypts in blocks of 3, plus one authentication tag

params._addDataVerifierAddress: Address of the add/update data proof verifier
params._ecdhVerifierAddress: Address of the ECDH transfer proof verifier
params._metadataAddress: Address of the metadata rendering contract

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved to manage token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist.

returns.ciphertext: Array of C=4 ciphertext uint256 values
returns.flag: Encryption method flag (true = self-encrypted, false = ECDH)

getFlag(uint256).details: True if encrypted with owner's keypair, false if encrypted via ECDH

returns._0: Timestamp when the token was last encrypted

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns whether `operator` is approved to manage the tokens of `owner`.

mint(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2].details: Requires payment of mint price and valid ZK proof of encryption

params.to: Address to receive the minted token

mintFrom(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint25.details: Minter handles all payment and allowlist logic. No ETH accepted here.

params.to: Address to receive the minted token

ownerOf(uint256).details: Returns the owner of token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist.

plaintextLength().details: C = ceil(N/3)*3 + 1 = 4 ciphertext fields are stored per token

registerPublicKey(uint256,uint256).details: Public key must be a valid point on the Baby Jubjub curve
